acquisition method: MS2 spectra were acquired using data-dependent acquisition
alkylation reagent: 100 μl IAA solution (0.05 M iodoacetamide in urea solution)
alkylation concentration: 100 μl IAA solution (0.05 M iodoacetamide in urea solution)
cleavage agent: we added 1 μg of MS grade trypsin (ThermoFisher Scientific)
collision energy: A normalized collision energy of 25 was applied in the HCD cell
fragmentation method: A normalized collision energy of 25 was applied in the HCD cell
instrument: connected to a Q Exactive HF hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: Eluting peptides were ionized via electrospray ionization (ESI)
